description.LOCATION_EN: Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel

2024-12-30T17:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel (Tuen Mun bound) are closed to all traffic. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-30T17:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門-赤鱲角隧道(往屯門方向)的全線現已封閉。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-12-30T17:29:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the tunnel tube fast lane of Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel (Tuen Mun bound) are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-30T17:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門-赤鱲角隧道(往屯門方向)的管道快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-12-30T17:53:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the tunnel tube fast lane of Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel (Tuen Mun bound) is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-30T17:53:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門-赤鱲角隧道(往屯門方向)的管道快線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-12-30T22:35:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube fast lane of Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel (Tuen Mun bound) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.

Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queues on Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) ends at Shing Mun Tunnel Road near Mei Lam Estate and Tsing Sha Highway near Mei Lam Estate. Traffic is congested now.

2024-12-31T16:49:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near San Hui Playground is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes is available to motorists.   Citizens please take note KMB and Long Win's services travelling via Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) has been affected, citizens please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.   Traffic queue on Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) ends at Yuen Long Highway near Long Tin Road.   Traffic is congested now.
2024-12-31T16:49:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近新墟遊樂場的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  市民請留意九巴及龍運途經屯門公路(往九龍方向)的服務會受影響，市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。  現時在屯門公路(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到元朗公路近朗天路。  現時上址交通擠塞。

Citizens please take note KMB and Long Win's service travelling via Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) has been affected, citizens please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) train service enhancement
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路（香港段）進一步提升列車服務

2025-01-01T08:08:00.CONTENT_CN:
由2025年1月5日起，高速鐵路（香港段）將作出以下服務提升及調整：

●新增西安北長途綫，途經洛陽龍門、華山北等新站點，每日提供北行及南行各一班列車；

●加強來往深圳北站、汕尾站及武漢站的列車服務，每日各加開一對列車；

●上海虹橋綫(非臥鋪列車)改停南昌東站、黃山北站、杭州西站及蘇州南站（1月5日起實施*）；

●一對原本以潮汕站為起點/終點的列車將改道，新增停靠龍川西站，並改以梅州西為起點/終點（1月5日開通）。

新增列車車票已開始發售。市民可透過12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式、指定代理（按此）或前往香港西九龍站購買車票。

*G99、G6504:1月4日暫停服務，1月5日起實施新路綫；

G6503、G100:1月5日暫停服務，1月6日起實施新路綫。

2025-01-01T14:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Malfunction of traffic lights at the following road sections: - the junction between Kwun Tong Road and Lai Yip Street - the junction between Kwun Tong Road and Elegance Road Motorists are advised to drive with utmost care when passing through the road junctions, pay extra attention to the traffic signs and safety of pedestrians. Pedestrians please pay attention to vehicles when crossing junctions with malfunctioned traffic lights.

同時，⾞輛不能由觀塘道(往旺⾓⽅向)進⼊開源道迴旋處。  受影響九巴巴士第5R、11X、15A、25R、74D、74E、74F、74P、93K、98A、274X、277A、277E、277P、277X及297號線須改道行駛。

2025-01-02T15:37:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , part of the lanes of Kwun Tong Road (Mong Kok bound) near Hoi Yuen Road roundabout is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   At the same time, vehicles on Kwun Tong Road (Mong Kok bound) cannot enter Hoi Yuen Road roundabout. 
Motorists heading to Hoi Yuen Road are advised to use alternative routes.   Affected KMB bus routes nos. 5R, 11X, 15A, 25R, 74D, 74E, 74F, 74P, 74X, 93K, 98A, 274X, 277A, 277E, 277P and 277X have been diverted. 
For the latest service arrangement of individual bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the bus company's website or mobile application.   Traffic is busy now.
